task: Put the dark bule object in the sink
raw:
SCENE ANALYSIS - A blue cup and an orange cup are on a wooden table. The blue cup is a rigid container with a cylindrical body. The orange cup is also a rigid container with a cylindrical body. The task is to move the blue cup to the sink, which is not visible in the image but is assumed to be a standard fixture in the environment. STRATEGY - First, reach for the blue cup, grasp it by its body for stability, then transport it to the sink area, and finally place it inside the sink. Failure modes include dropping the cup during transport or misplacing it. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1: Reach for the blue cup at its body. Step 2: Grasp the blue cup by its body to ensure a secure hold. Step 3: Transport the blue cup to the sink area, maintaining a safe distance from other objects. Step 4: Place the blue cup inside the sink, ensuring it is stable and not obstructing other objects.
Goal: inside(blue_cup, sink)
Scene: blue_cup, orange_cup, table
Step 1: reach(blue_cup)
  affordance_region: the body of the blue cup
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, blue_cup, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, blue_cup) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(blue_cup)
  affordance_region: the body of the blue cup
  contact: holding(blue_cup) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(blue_cup)
Step 3: transport(blue_cup -> sink)
  affordance_region: an empty area inside the sink
  spatial: above(blue_cup, sink, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(blue_cup)
  done_when: above(blue_cup, sink, 0.05)
Step 4: place(blue_cup -> sink)
  affordance_region: an empty area inside the sink
  contact: surface_contact(blue_cup, sink) [completion]; released(blue_cup) [completion]
  pose: stable(blue_cup) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(blue_cup, sink) AND released(blue_cup)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the body of the blue cup
the body of the blue cup
an empty area inside the sink
an empty area inside the sink
